name: Cable Matters Thunderbolt 4 Cable 2m
shortDescription: Thunderbolt 4 cable with 40Gbps bandwidth and 100W charging.
description: Cable Matters Thunderbolt 4 cable supports high-speed data, high-resolution displays, and USB-C Power Delivery up to 100W.

comments.name: Kristijan
comments.text: Stable with dock, monitor, and external SSD.
